'''Belsed-Qan Idan''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the final decades of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
[[File:Space_pirates.jpg|thumb|right|250px|The Jedi taskforce led by Idan and Fisto attacks an [[Iridium]] [[Longprow attack cruiser]].]]
Discovered to be [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], Belsed-Qan Idan was [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]. Idan, eventually attaining the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]], studied the [[Jedi Sentinel/Legends|Sentinel's]] specialization of [[Jedi Watchman/Legends|Jedi Watchman]] and was assigned to [[Aargau/Legends|Aargau]].

As the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]] in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] spread, the number of conflicts grew across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. When the [[Iridium Pirates/Legends|Pirates of Iridium]] began to plague the [[Atrivis sector/Legends|Atrivis sector]], the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] called upon Idan to assist in a diplomatic mission to negotiate with the pirates. Idan joined Master [[Kit Fisto/Legends|Kit Fisto]] aboard the ''[[Monitor III]]'', but they were attacked by the [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] using a [[power gem]] near the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Vuchelle]]. Piloting a [[Delta-7 Aethersprite-class light interceptor/Legends|Delta-7 interceptor]] against the pirates, Idan contacted them, attempting to end the battle before the pirates escalated the assault.<ref name="HNN49" /> While the Jedi were successful in defeating the pirates, tragedy struck Aargau in Idan's absence. On Aargau, [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Aks Moe/Legends|Aks Moe]] of [[Malastare/Legends|Malastare]] died in a fiery explosion that engulfed his transport. Deemed an [[Assassin/Legends|assassination]] by [[Junior Representative/Legends|Representative]] [[Ainlee Teem/Legends|Ainlee Teem]], the [[Gran/Legends|Gran]] blamed Idan for not being onworld at the time to prevent Moe's [[Death/Legends|death]].<ref name="Hnn-Senator Moe Killed in Blast">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|50|news/1344_1.html|Senator Moe Killed in Blast}}</ref>
